# One4Health™

> India's first premium KSM-66® Ashwagandha gummy — science-backed, vegan, and sugar-free.

One4Health™ makes the most clinically credible ashwagandha supplement available in India. The product uses 300mg of KSM-66® — the world's most studied full-spectrum ashwagandha root extract, backed by 22+ randomised controlled trials — combined with 400IU Vitamin D2 and 10mg Black Pepper Extract for 30% better absorption. Available as strawberry-flavoured gummies at ₹369/jar. Made in India. Free shipping. 15-day refund guarantee.

## Product

**One4Health™ Ashwagandha Gummies KSM-66®**

- Format: Strawberry-flavoured gummies (30 per jar = 15-day supply at 2 gummies per day)
- Price: ₹369 for 1 jar / ₹699 for 2 jars (save ₹199)
- Key ingredient: 300mg KSM-66® Ashwagandha (full-spectrum root extract, ≥5% withanolides)
- Supporting ingredients: 400IU Vitamin D2 (vegan-sourced), 10mg Black Pepper Extract (piperine, for bioavailability)
- Dietary: 100% Vegan, Sugar-Free, Gelatin-Free, Gluten-Free, Peanut-Free, Soy-Free, Milk-Free, Non-GMO
- Serving: 1–2 gummies per day with food
- Rating: 5.0/5 from 140 verified reviews
- Shipping: Free across India, 3–5 business days
- Returns: 15-day full refund, no questions asked

## Why KSM-66® is Different

KSM-66® is not just any ashwagandha — it is the only root-only, full-spectrum extract standardised to ≥5% withanolides with 22+ peer-reviewed clinical trials. Key findings from published research:

- Reduces serum cortisol by 27.9% (Chandrasekhar et al., 2012)
- Improves sleep quality scores by 72% (Langade et al., 2019)
- Reduces perceived stress (PSS scale) by 44% vs placebo
- Enhances VO2 max and endurance in athletes (Shenoy et al., 2012)
- Improves male testosterone and fertility markers (Ambiye et al., 2013)
- Safe for long-term daily use with no dependency or withdrawal

Most ashwagandha products use root+leaf extracts or low-concentration powders. One4Health™ uses root-only extract, which mirrors all major clinical trials.

## What It Helps With

- Chronic stress and high cortisol levels
- Poor sleep quality and difficulty falling asleep
- Mental fatigue and cognitive fog
- Low energy and burnout
- Anxiety without causing sedation or drowsiness
- Post-workout recovery and endurance

## Who It Is For

Primarily suited for: working professionals (22–40), students during exam periods, entrepreneurs, and anyone experiencing modern urban stress. The gummy format improves adherence vs capsules — people actually take it daily.

## Who Should Avoid It

Pregnant or breastfeeding women; people on thyroid medication, immunosuppressants, sedatives, or anti-anxiety medication should consult a physician before use. Not for children under 18. Maximum 2 gummies per day.

## Certifications and Safety

Manufactured in GMP-certified, FSSC 22000-certified, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 22000, and HACCP-certified facilities. Registered with US FDA. FSSAI licensed (licence no. 12725998000541). Third-party lab tested for purity and heavy metals. Cruelty Free. Made in India.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: When will I feel results?**
A: Initial relaxation can be felt within 7 days. Clinically meaningful stress and sleep benefits typically peak at 6–8 weeks of consistent daily use.

**Q: Is it safe to take every day?**
A: Yes. KSM-66® is an adaptogen, not a stimulant or sedative. Daily use is safe and recommended for sustained benefit.

**Q: What does it taste like?**
A: Strawberry flavour, no soil taste. That was the whole point.

**Q: Is it really vegan?**
A: Yes — no gelatin, no animal-derived ingredients of any kind. The Vitamin D2 (ergocalciferol) is plant-sourced, not D3 from lanolin.

**Q: How does it compare to other ashwagandha brands in India?**
A: Most Indian brands use raw ashwagandha powder with low withanolide concentration and no clinical backing. One4Health™ uses patented KSM-66® which is the only extract studied in 22+ RCTs at the exact dose (300mg) used in our formula.

**Q: Can I take it with other supplements?**
A: Generally yes. Particularly safe to stack with magnesium, B-complex, or omega-3s. Avoid stacking with other adaptogens or herbal sedatives without medical advice.
